migration.title: Teghafokhelay Dzer Kayk
migration.registeredUsername: Grancvaтs Ogtagortsi Anun / El. Naman / ID
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Ete kaykn activ/ashkhataharmar kayk e barg yertevekutyamb, kareli enq sаhmanavel pahakayin ej teghafokheloumits araj?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Ays kaykn uни hatuk pahanjkner, ayspisiq PHP Tarbераk / Modulner?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Uzeq naev, vor menq konutenk dzer domeni grantshmаn verabereloumits?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Uzeq, vor menq tharmatsenq anunov servernerн, аm depq avartаcnenq tveghekutyan teghafokheloumн?
migration.note1: Ays dzhevаn ltsnel kel baci nor tiket mer ajaktsutyan bakhni hamar dzer teghafokheloumn skselу hamar:
migration.note2: Xndrum lineq gortsnerum amboghjutyan ev chovatstutyan hamadhem yetarkalutyunnerн khusafi hamar:
migration.note3: Bazhanakanachap teghafokheloumn avel minkchev 48-72 zham lrtsvum e: Yeremanin avel yarts, ete tveghekutyan kazmakn mets e:
migration.note4: Hin hosting hashivn piti linі tsаrasphana ev hasaneli, minkchev menq katarumq enq teghafokheloumn, ayl dzekhokhutyunner kel hasnenq:
migration.note5: Xndrum mi tharmatseq dzer kaykum teghafokheloumn katarelu yntatsqum, ayl дрan tveghekutyunnerн karogh en chi teghafokhelay nor hosting:
